args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE aas.idShort = 'mir 100' OR asset.globalAssetId CONTAINS 'mir 100' OR asset.globalAssetId CONTAINS 'mir100'
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, asset.globalAssetId, asset.assetKind

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:mir100:type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:mir100:type:technicaldataagv'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(elem:SubmodelElement)
RETURN elem.idShort, elem.modelType

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:mir100:type:technicaldataagv'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(speedWithLoad:SubmodelElement)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(value:LangString)
WHERE speedWithLoad.idShort = 'SpeedMaxWithMaxLoadAsSpecified'
RETURN speedWithLoad.idShort, value.language, value.text

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:mir100:type:technicaldataagv'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['SpeedMaxWithMaxLoadAsSpecified', 'SpeedMaxEmptyAsSpecified']
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.valueType

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:mir100:type:technicaldataagv'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'SpeedMaxWithMaxLoadAsSpecified'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.valueType, sc.id
